subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the Most Great Handle! Having quaffed the chalice of guidance from the hand of the Cup-bearer of bounty, and tasted its sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بالعروه الوثقی چون کاس هدایت را از دست ساقی عنایت نوشیدی و حلاوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @goodly deeds; actions
